author: doll-agent
content: Replace per-element I/O loops in NpyElement impls for bool, DateTime64, Timedelta64. Numeric primitives already use bulk read/write via the impl_npy_element! macro. The boolean impl wrote one byte per element via write_all (one syscall per bool); newtype impls for DateTime64/Timedelta64 wrote 8 bytes per element. Stage to a single buffer, write_all once. For reads, read_exact the whole block then map. The newtype impls leverage repr(transparent) over i64 to reinterpret the slice directly.
